name: publication_queue_buildout
description: Build a concrete publication/publification queue from current archive materials, DOI policy context, cluster-fit audits, and workflow/task state; output prioritized deposit path and immediate execution tasks.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read DOI-related artifacts/documents/tasks","Create queue artifact","Create immediate drafting/metadata tasks","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: zenodo_automation_plan
description: Build and archive the operational plan for scheduled Zenodo DOI publication, qualification, writeback, and citation automation inside Passioncraft.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read archive/workflow/task context","Create Zenodo automation spec AgentDocument","Create implementation map Artifact","Create phase tasks","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: lee_sharks_attribution_package
description: Prepare a full attribution repair package for Lee Sharks including response language, citation lines, provenance guidance, and follow-up audit tasks.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read current site/docs/task context","Create attribution memo AgentDocument","Create citation summary Artifact","Create site/doc audit Task","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: create_clarification_of_thexgona_dissolution
description: Create and archive a clarification memo explaining the dissolution of Hexagona weight from chamber-purity framing into the sfOS system within Passioncraft while preserving historical naming in the archive.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Draft clarification memo","Create AgentDocument","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: openchamber_site_page_update_plan
description: Create a sitewide page update plan and task set to reframe public pages under OPENchamber & The SomaticFilter by Passioncraft while preserving archival integrity.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read recent reframe context and existing tasks","Create site migration matrix Artifact","Create page-level implementation Tasks","Update related migration task","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: openchamber_somaticfilter_reframe_plan
description: Create and archive the forward-facing reframe that positions work under OPENchamber & The SomaticFilter by Passioncraft, with migration guidance and implementation follow-up.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read recent artifacts and documents for context","Create reframe map Artifact","Create forward reframe memo AgentDocument","Create migration task","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: end_of_day_archive_note
description: Archive a concise end-of-day note capturing major deliverables, tone shifts, and closing assessment.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Create end-of-day AgentDocument","Create summary Artifact","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: door_protocol_v0_2_consolidation
description: Consolidate Door Protocol technical specification and subsequent addenda into a unified versioned specification.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read existing Door Protocol materials","Create consolidated AgentDocument","Create consolidation summary Artifact","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: door_protocol_spec_addendum_archive
description: Create and archive formal Door Protocol specification addenda, including canonical examples and accompanying parenthetical principles.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Create canonical example Artifact","Create Door Protocol addendum AgentDocument","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: retrieval_pack_builder
description: Build reusable retrieval packs on priority themes such as Rosary canon, Logotic Hacking doctrine, Nexus Thread governance, EA-FORGE-01, and somatic architecture by assembling linked records with summary context.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Select priority themes for retrieval pack generation","Read linked Beads, Threads, Replies, Artifacts, AgentDocuments, and related records","Assemble themed bundle with concise summaries and reference links","Create retrieval pack Artifact or AgentDocument","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: governance_change_watch
description: Monitor recent archive activity for governance proposals, vow refinements, ratifications, entity-type proposals, and policy-change language; create a governance watch Artifact and review Tasks when warranted.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read recent Beads, Threads, Replies, Artifacts, and AgentDocuments","Scan for governance, vow, ratification, amendment, and entity-proposal language","Summarize detected governance changes or proposals","Create review Tasks for significant governance items when warranted","Create governance watch Artifact","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: heteronym_signal_digest
description: Track activity, themes, symbolic patterns, and functional drift across heteronym-linked and Logotic persona-linked contributions; generate a periodic digest Artifact of voice continuity and role fidelity.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read recent persona-linked Beads, Threads, Replies, Artifacts, and documents","Group by heteronym or persona identity","Summarize current themes, symbols, continuity, and drift indicators","Create heteronym signal digest Artifact","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: provenance_integrity_audit
description: Audit Artifacts, AgentDocuments, and other archive records for missing, vague, or broken provenance and linkage; create a summary audit Artifact and Tasks for lineage repair where needed.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read Artifacts, AgentDocuments, and linked archive records","Check provenance completeness and related-entity linkage integrity","Flag missing, vague, or orphaned lineage","Create repair Tasks for records needing provenance restoration","Create provenance audit Artifact","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: archive_topology_digest
description: Map archive structure by chamber, domain, author, artifact type, and activity density; identify neglected zones, overloaded areas, isolated threads, and doctrinal density gaps; publish a digest Artifact.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read aggregate counts across archive entities","Group by chamber, domain, author, artifact type, and activity recency","Detect neglected chambers, overloaded domains, isolated threads, and density gaps","Create archive topology digest Artifact","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: thread_to_doctrine_pipeline
description: Identify rich threads with strong participation, awards, or unresolved conceptual value; synthesize thesis, tensions, supporting points, and next doctrinal use into doctrine-ready Artifact drafts.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read candidate Threads, Replies, and AwardLogs","Select high-value threads by reply richness, awards, or unresolved doctrinal value","Summarize thesis, tensions, support, and unresolved openings","Create doctrine-draft Artifact per selected thread or bundled set","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: canonicalization_candidate_scan
description: Inspect recent and high-density records for canon-worthiness using signals such as ratification language, repeated reference, doctrinal clarity, and cross-domain relevance; create a shortlist Artifact of canonicalization candidates.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read recent Beads, Threads, Replies, Artifacts, and AgentDocuments","Score records for canonicalization signals including ratification, repeated reference, density, and cross-domain relevance","Shortlist candidate records with justification notes","Create canonicalization candidate Artifact","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: symbolic_motif_tracker
description: Track recurring symbolic language and motif migration across beads, threads, replies, artifacts, and documents; measure frequency, co-occurrence, and domain spread; create a motif evolution digest Artifact.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read recent content across archive entities","Scan for recurring motifs and symbolic phrases","Measure motif frequency, co-occurrence, domain spread, and chamber spread","Identify emerging, stable, and declining motifs","Create motif evolution digest Artifact","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: doctrine_crosslinker
description: Compare newly ingested fragments and recent records against prior beads, threads, artifacts, and AgentDocuments to detect doctrinal overlap, echo, contradiction, expansion, and ratification links, then publish a cross-reference Artifact.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read recent fragment summaries and recent canonical records","Compare for overlap, extension, contradiction, and ratification signals","Build cross-reference map linking beads, threads, artifacts, chambers, and documents","Create doctrine crosslink Artifact","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: logotic_fragment_ingest
description: Scan newly created Beads, Replies, Threads, and Artifacts; extract salient fragments, motifs, entities, domains, and symbolic phrases; create a fragment summary Artifact; and persist a cursor checkpoint for incremental LogoticAgent processing.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read AgentState cursor for last processed timestamp","Read newly created Beads, Replies, Threads, and Artifacts since cursor","Extract motifs, doctrines, symbols, entities, domains, chamber references, and salient phrases","Create fragment summary Artifact with grouped findings and source links","Write updated AgentState cursor","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: weekly_archive_summary
description: Aggregate counts of all major entity types created this week and create a summary AgentDocument.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Count weekly entity creation across archive","Create summary AgentDocument","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: vow_breach_scan
description: Scan recent beads and replies for coercion keywords including coerce, pressure, extract, override, force, compel, manipulate. Flag matches and create a Task for each flagged item.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read recent Beads and Replies","Scan for coercion keywords","Create Task for each flagged item","Create summary Artifact","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: thread_health_digest
description: Count threads by status and domain. Flag threads open for more than 14 days with no replies. Create a digest Artifact.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read Threads","Count by status and domain","Check for open threads older than 14 days with no replies","Create digest Artifact","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: prestige_rollup
description: For each Profile, sum AwardLog entries targeting that profile and update coherence_total, somatic_resonance_total, and myth_density_total. Create a summary Artifact.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read Profiles","Read AwardLogs","Aggregate award totals per profile","Update profile prestige totals","Create summary Artifact","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: escrow_audit
description: Filter ResolveEscrows by status, group by status, flag stale forming/sworn escrows older than 7 days with no progress, and create a summary Artifact.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Read ResolveEscrows","Group by status","Flag stale escrows older than 7 days","Create summary Artifact","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]

name: review_unreviewed_beads
description: Filter beads where hexagnt_reviewed=false. Assess for coercion flags or ethical concerns. Update review fields and create a summary Artifact.
steps: ["Create WorkflowRun","Filter Beads where hexagnt_reviewed=false","Assess ethical/coercion concerns","Update each Bead with hexagnt_reviewed=true and hexagnt_note","Create summary Artifact","Update WorkflowRun","Update WorkflowDefinition counters"]
